description: Wisdom rules seeded at genre-proposal time from a successful reflection. Expected to be curated + extended via future LEARN.5 wisdom-rule proposals as sessions in this genre accumulate.

rules.rule: Players swap adjacent tiles to form lines of three or more matching items.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Special items are created by matching four or more tiles, each with unique effects.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Levels have a limited number of moves to achieve a target score.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Cascading matches occur when falling tiles create new matches, increasing the score.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Bright, colorful visuals and smooth animations enhance the tactile experience.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre
